info.name: Approach2-SequentialFeedback-MultiContract-100K-30d-fix1
info.description:
APPROACH 2 — FIX 1: ACTUS PP PAYOFF SIGN CONVENTION

BUG FIXED:
  ACTUS PAM with contractRole=RPA returns PP (prepayment/redemption) payoffs
  as POSITIVE values. Positive PP payoff = notionalPrincipal reduced = supply burned.
  From the protocol's perspective, positive PP payoff = cash OUTFLOW to redeemer.

  The original Approach 2 scripts checked (pp.payoff < 0) to detect redemptions.
  Since ACTUS returns POSITIVE PP payoffs, zero redemptions were detected,
  causing Iter 2 to be identical to Iter 1 (fake convergence).

FIX APPLIED IN 5 LOCATIONS:
  1. Phase 5 test script: totalRedemptions calculation
  2. Phase 6.1 pre-request: redemptionsByDate filter + cumulative calc
  3. Phase 7 test script: totalRedemptionsI2 calculation
  4. Phase 8.1 test script: convergence comparison totals
  5. Phase 8.2 test script: dashboard redemption tracking + supply reduction

EACH FIX:
  OLD: if(pp.payoff < 0) totalRedemptions += Math.abs(pp.payoff);
  NEW: if(pp.payoff > 0) totalRedemptions += pp.payoff;

  OLD: supply += redemptionsByDate[dd.date]; // was adding negative (no-op)
  NEW: supply -= redemptionsByDate[dd.date]; // subtracts positive PP payoffs

EXPECTED RESULT:
  Phase 6 should now detect ~$66,152 in cumulative redemptions from Iter 1.
  Iter 2 cash index will be LOWER than Iter 1 (cash drained by redemptions).
  Iter 2 may produce DIFFERENT PP events → real convergence test.

Open Postman Console (Ctrl+Alt+C) before running.

item.name: ═══ PHASE 1: Exogenous Data (Not Derived From Contracts) ═══

exec: console.log('APPROACH 2 — FIX 1: PP SIGN CONVENTION CORRECTED');
console.log('FIX: ACTUS PAM/RPA PP payoffs are POSITIVE (not negative).');
console.log('     Positive PP payoff = supply burned = cash outflow.');
console.log('     Original scripts checked (payoff < 0), missing all redemptions.');
console.log('✅ Phase 1: PEG_RISK_SCORE loaded (EXOGENOUS — not derived from contracts)');

item.name: 1.2 Create minimal scenario for T-Bill run

exec: pm.test('Minimal scenario for T-Bill run', function(){

item.name: 2.1 Run T-Bill Simulation → Capture Actual Events

exec: console.log('PHASE 2: T-BILL ONLY SIMULATION — ACTUAL EVENTS');
var payoff = (e.payoff !== undefined && e.payoff !== null) ? e.payoff : 0;
for(var d = new Date(startDate); d <= endDate; d.setDate(d.getDate()+1)){
console.log('DERIVED DAILY TIMELINE (from actual T-Bill events):');
var matNote = dd.maturedToday ? ' ← ' + dd.maturedToday.cid + ' MD +$' + dd.maturedToday.payoff.toFixed(2) : '';
console.log('  ' + dd.date + ' | Cash=$' + dd.cash.toFixed(2) + ' | TBillMV=$' + dd.tbillMV.toFixed(2) + ' | Total=$' + dd.totalReserves.toFixed(2) + ' | Bills=' + dd.aliveBills + matNote);
console.log('✅ Daily data stored. Cash DERIVED from actual MD events.');
console.log('   ⚠️  Cash does NOT yet include redemptions (iteration 0).');

item.name: ═══ PHASE 3: Build DYNAMIC Indexes From T-Bill Events ═══

exec: var indexData = daily.map(function(dd){ return {time: dd.time, value: dd.tbillMV}; });
var body = { riskFactorID: 'SC_TBILL_MV_DYN_I1', marketObjectCode: 'SC_TBILL_MV', base: 1.0, data: indexData };
console.log('✅ SC_TBILL_MV_DYN_I1: T-Bill MtM (DYNAMIC — from actual events)');

item.name: 3.2 Add SC_CASH_RESERVE (DYNAMIC Iter 1 — maturity inflows only)

exec: var indexData = daily.map(function(dd){ return {time: dd.time, value: dd.cash}; });
var body = { riskFactorID: 'SC_CASH_DYN_I1', marketObjectCode: 'SC_CASH_RESERVE', base: 1.0, data: indexData };
console.log('✅ SC_CASH_DYN_I1: Cash = $6K initial + actual maturity inflows');
console.log('   ⚠️  Does NOT include redemption outflows (no PP data yet).');
console.log('   This is an OPTIMISTIC upper bound on cash.');
var indexData = daily.map(function(dd){ return {time: dd.time, value: dd.totalReserves}; });
var body = { riskFactorID: 'SC_RESERVES_DYN_I1', marketObjectCode: 'SC_TOTAL_RESERVES', base: 1.0, data: indexData };
console.log('✅ SC_RESERVES_DYN_I1: Total reserves = cash + T-Bill MtM');
console.log('✅ sc_seq_iter1_100k: Scenario with DYNAMIC indexes + 2 models');
var payoff = (e.payoff !== undefined && e.payoff !== null) ? e.payoff : 0;
var nomVal = (e.nominalValue !== undefined && e.nominalValue !== null) ? e.nominalValue : null;
ppEvents.push({ time: e.time, type: type, payoff: payoff, nominalValue: nomVal });
otherEvents.push({time: e.time, type: type, payoff: payoff, nominalValue: nomVal});
// FIX 1: ACTUS PP payoffs are POSITIVE for RPA
//   Positive PP payoff = supply burned = cash outflow
var nomStr = pp.nominalValue !== null ? ' remaining=$' + pp.nominalValue.toFixed(2) : '';
console.log('  ' + pp.time + ' ' + pp.type + ' payoff=$' + pp.payoff.toFixed(2) + nomStr);
console.log('  Total redemption outflows (positive PP payoffs): $' + totalRedemptions.toFixed(2));
console.log('✅ Iteration 1 PP events stored for Phase 6 feedback loop.');

item.name: ═══ PHASE 6: FEEDBACK — Rebuild Indexes With Redemption Data ═══

exec: // FEEDBACK LOOP: Rebuild cash index using Iteration 1 redemptions
// FIX 1: ACTUS PAM/RPA PP payoffs are POSITIVE.
//   Positive PP payoff = notionalPrincipal reduced = cash outflow to redeemer.
//   Original bug: checked (pp.payoff < 0), which matched ZERO events.
//   Fix: check (pp.payoff > 0) to detect actual redemptions.
// Iter 1 cash = initial + maturity inflows (no redemptions)
// Iter 2 cash = initial + maturity inflows - ACTUAL redemptions from Iter 1
// Build a map of redemptions by date
// Rebuild cash timeline: start from iter0 (maturity inflows only)
// then subtract cumulative redemptions day by day
cumulativeRedemptions += redemptionsByDate[dateKey];  // FIX: already positive, no Math.abs needed
// Also store corrected daily data for reserves computation
console.log('Pre-request: Built Iter 2 cash index with ' + Object.keys(redemptionsByDate).length + ' redemption days');
// Log first few corrected cash values for verification
console.log('✅ SC_CASH_DYN_I2: Cash with actual Iter 1 redemptions subtracted');
console.log('   FIX: Now correctly detects POSITIVE PP payoffs as redemptions.');
var indexData = corrected.map(function(dd){ return {time: dd.time, value: dd.totalReserves}; });
var body = { riskFactorID: 'SC_RESERVES_DYN_I2', marketObjectCode: 'SC_TOTAL_RESERVES', base: 1.0, data: indexData };
console.log('✅ SC_RESERVES_DYN_I2: Total reserves corrected with redemptions');
console.log('✅ br_seq_100k_i2: BackingRatioModel (reads corrected Iter 2 indexes)');
console.log('✅ sc_seq_iter2_100k: Uses corrected Iter 2 indexes');
var payoff = (e.payoff !== undefined && e.payoff !== null) ? e.payoff : 0;
var nomVal = (e.nominalValue !== undefined && e.nominalValue !== null) ? e.nominalValue : null;
iter2PP.push({time: e.time, type: e.type, payoff: payoff, nominalValue: nomVal});
console.log('  ⚠️  No PP/MRD events in Iter 2.');
var nomStr = pp.nominalValue !== null ? ' remaining=$' + pp.nominalValue.toFixed(2) : '';
console.log('  ' + pp.time + ' ' + pp.type + ' payoff=$' + pp.payoff.toFixed(2) + nomStr);
console.log('✅ Iteration 2 complete. Phase 8 will compare convergence.');
console.log('If Iter 1 and Iter 2 produce SIMILAR PP events, the feedback');
console.log('loop has converged. If they DIFFER, more iterations needed.');
console.log('❌ Missing PP event data. Ensure Phases 5 and 7 ran.');
console.log('  Iteration 1 total redemptions: $' + totalI1.toFixed(2) + ' (' + iter1PP.length + ' PP events)');
console.log('  Iteration 2 total redemptions: $' + totalI2.toFixed(2) + ' (' + iter2PP.length + ' PP events)');
console.log('No PP events with non-zero payoffs in either iteration.');
console.log('   Consider running Iteration 3, or use Approach 3 (middleware).');
// FIX: Build redemptions by date — check payoff > 0 (was < 0)
console.log('DATE         | CASH        | T-BILLS     | TOTAL RES   | SUPPLY      | BACKING  | LIQUIDITY | ACE  | SOURCE');
supply -= redemptionsByDate[dd.date];  // FIX: subtract positive payoffs (was +=negative)
console.log('🚫 Stress dates: ' + stressDates[0] + ' to ' + stressDates[stressDates.length-1] + ' (' + stressDates.length + ' days)');
console.log('  Cash:    DERIVED from actual T-Bill MD events (Phase 2)');
console.log('           - actual PP redemptions from Iter 2 (Phase 7)');
console.log('  T-Bills: INTERPOLATED MtM from actual contract parameters');
console.log('  Supply:  $100K initial - cumulative positive PP payoffs');
console.log('  ACTUS PAM/RPA PP payoffs are POSITIVE = supply reduction.');
console.log('  Redemptions correctly detected and subtracted from cash.');
console.log('  Supply correctly reduced by cumulative PP payoffs.');
